channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Dow industrials poised for over 500-point drop as crude surges on Iran conflict
Anthropicâs Claude tops App Store charts as backlash builds against OpenAI
Here's how oil can reach $120 per barrel, according to JPMorgan strategists
Live updates: U.S. confirms 3 fighter jets downed over Kuwait in 'apparent friendly fire incident'
item.description: Follow the latest news after the U.S. and Israel launched a massive attack on Iran that killed Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

item.title: The workhorse fuel of the industrial world is seeing a bigger spike than crude
Trump vows to 'avenge' the deaths of U.S. service members, says combat operations continue
item.description: This was CNBC's live coverage of the U.S.-Israel strikes in Iran on March 1.

item.title: How Iran chooses its supreme leader, and who could be next?
item.description: Ayatollah Khamenei's death following the joint U.S.-Israeli airstrikes has compelled country's leadership to confront the task of selecting a new supr...

item.title: Gold and silver prices are rising, and so is the U.S. dollar
Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is dead, state news media confirms
item.description: The attacks began Saturday morning with Iran following with retaliatory strikes across the Middle East.

item.title: Iran after Khamenei: What's next and what it means for the country?
item.description: Khamenei assumed power following the death of Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini in 1989, inheriting a revolutionary state still consolidating itself.
